title: Terracotta Plant Pot with Saucer - Long Tom, Rustic Mediterranean Garden Succulent Planter, Tall Terracotta Garden Herb, Bulb, Crocus, Flower Pot with Dish
features: Long Tom Terracotta Plant Pot with Saucer
Bring timeless garden charm to your home with this elegant tall terracotta plant pot with a saucer
This versatile planter is finished in a beautifully aged patina & designed with practicality in mind
The breathable terracotta encourages healthy root systems while the saucer helps protect surfaces from water spills
Perfect for growing kitchen herbs like thyme, rosemary, or basil, or for showcasing bulbs or decorative houseplants

Each pot showcases rustic elegance that complements any windowsill, kitchen, greenhouse or patio. Display them together in different sizes or spread them across your home for a cohesive botanical look
Dimensions: 15 x 17cm | Each pot has a small hole for drainage

SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - We are a UK based small business with a shop in Ross-on-Wye. If you have any queries or require any after sales support, our friendly customer services team will be more than happy to help
